title: Custom photo cakes with no eggs — pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park
summary:
A photo of your choosing, transferred onto a fully eggless cake. Not a compromise. The standard option — $19.99 added to any custom order.

Families from Merrylands and Westmead order from Harris Park because they can't find an eggless photo cake nearby. We don't offer egg-free as a variant. Every cake is eggless.

Send the photo via WhatsApp (+61 425 697 725). 48-hour notice. Pickup from Wigram Street, Harris Park — 5 minutes from Parramatta CBD. 🎂
